info.name: Microsoft Azure Azure OpenAI API version 2024-02-01
info.description: APIs for fine-tuning and managing deployments of OpenAI models.

item.name: files
{file-id}
content

Microsoft Azure Gets The Content Of The File Specified By The Given File Id 
files Can Be User Uploaded Content Or Generated By The Service Like Result Metrics Of A Fine Tune Job

request.description: Needs a more full description created.

response.name: Success

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

response.body: <binary>

response.name: An error occurred.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Microsoft Azure Gets Details For A Single File Specified By The Given File Id Including Status, Size, Purpose, Etc

request.description: Needs a more full description created.

response.name: Success

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

response.body:
{
  "filename": "<string>",
  "purpose": "fine-tune-results",
  "object": "list",
  "created_at": "<integer>",
  "id": "<string>",
  "status": "processed",
  "bytes": "<long>",
  "status_details": "<string>"
}

response.name: An error occurred.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name:
Microsoft Azure Deletes The File With The Given File Id 
deletion Is Also Allowed If A File Was Used, E G , As Training File In A Fine Tune Job

request.description: Needs a more full description created.

response.name: An error occurred.

item.name: import
Microsoft Azure Creates A New File Entity By Importing Data From A Provided Url Uploaded Files Can, For Example, Be Used For Training Or Evaluating Fine Tuned Models

request.description: Needs a more full description created.

response.name: The file has been successfully created.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

description.content: The location of the newly created item.

response.body:
{
  "filename": "<string>",
  "purpose": "fine-tune-results",
  "object": "list",
  "created_at": "<integer>",
  "id": "<string>",
  "status": "processed",
  "bytes": "<long>",
  "status_details": "<string>"
}

response.name: An error occurred.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name:
Microsoft Azure Gets A List Of All Files Owned By The Azure Openai Resource 
these Include User Uploaded Content Like Files With Purpose "fine Tune" For Training Or Validation Of Fine Tunes Models
as Well As Files That Are Generated By The Service Such

query.description: Only return files with the given purpose.

request.description: Needs a more full description created.

response.name: Success

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

query.description: Only return files with the given purpose.

response.body:
{
  "object": "list",
  "data": [
    {
      "filename": "<string>",
      "purpose": "fine-tune-results",
      "object": "fine_tuning.job",
      "created_at": "<integer>",
      "id": "<string>",
      "status": "processed",
      "bytes": "<long>",
      "status_details": "<string>"
    },
    {
      "filename": "<string>",
      "purpose": "fine-tune",
      "object": "file",
      "created_at": "<integer>",
      "id": "<string>",
      "status": "pending",
      "bytes": "<long>",
      "status_details": "<string>"
    }
  ]
}

response.name: An error occurred.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

query.description: Only return files with the given purpose.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Creates A New File Entity By Uploading Data From A Local Machine Uploaded Files Can, For Example, Be Used For Training Or Evaluating Fine Tuned Models

formdata.description: (Required) The intended purpose of the uploaded documents. Use "fine-tune" for fine-tuning. This allows us to validate the format of the uploaded file. (This can only be one of fine-tune,fine-tune-results)
(Required) Gets or sets the file to upload into Azure OpenAI.

request.description: Needs a more full description created.

response.name: The file has been successfully created.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

formdata.description: (Required) The intended purpose of the uploaded documents. Use "fine-tune" for fine-tuning. This allows us to validate the format of the uploaded file. (This can only be one of fine-tune,fine-tune-results)
(Required) Gets or sets the file to upload into Azure OpenAI.

description.content: The location of the newly created item.

response.body:
{
  "filename": "<string>",
  "purpose": "fine-tune-results",
  "object": "list",
  "created_at": "<integer>",
  "id": "<string>",
  "status": "processed",
  "bytes": "<long>",
  "status_details": "<string>"
}

response.name: An error occurred.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

formdata.description: (Required) The intended purpose of the uploaded documents. Use "fine-tune" for fine-tuning. This allows us to validate the format of the uploaded file. (This can only be one of fine-tune,fine-tune-results)
(Required) Gets or sets the file to upload into Azure OpenAI.

item.name: fine_tuning
jobs
{fine-tuning-job-id}
events

Microsoft Azure Gets The Events For The Fine Tune Job Specified By The Given Fine Tune Id 
events Are Created When The Job Status Changes, E G Running Or Complete, And When Results Are Uploaded

query.description: Identifier for the last event from the previous pagination request.
Number of events to retrieve. Defaults to 20.

variable.description: (Required) The identifier of the fine-tune job.

request.description: Needs a more full description created.

response.name: Success

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

query.description: Identifier for the last event from the previous pagination request.
Number of events to retrieve. Defaults to 20.

response.name: An error occurred.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

query.description: Identifier for the last event from the previous pagination request.
Number of events to retrieve. Defaults to 20.

item.name: cancel
Microsoft Azure Cancels The Processing Of The Fine Tune Job Specified By The Given Fine Tune Id

variable.description: (Required) The identifier of the fine-tune job.

request.description: Needs a more full description created.

response.name: The fine tune has been successfully canceled

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

response.body:
{
  "model": "<string>",
  "training_file": "<string>",
  "object": "list",
  "created_at": "<integer>",
  "id": "<string>",
  "status": "running",
  "fine_tuned_model": "<string>",
  "validation_file": "<string>",
  "result_files": [
    "<string>",
    "<string>"
  ],
  "finished_at": "<integer>",
  "organisation_id": "<string>",
  "trained_tokens": "<integer>",
  "hyperparameters": {
    "n_epochs": "<integer>",
    "batch_size": "<integer>",
    "learning_rate_multiplier": "<double>"
  },
  "suffix": "<string>"
}

response.name: An error occurred.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name:
Microsoft Azure Gets A List Of All Fine Tune Jobs Owned By The Azure Openai Resource 
the Details That Are Returned For Each Fine Tune Job Contain Besides Its Identifier
the Base Model, Training And Validation Files, Hyper Parameters, Time Stamps, Statu

query.description: Identifier for the last event from the previous pagination request.
Number of events to retrieve. Defaults to 20.

request.description: Needs a more full description created.

response.name: Success

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

query.description: Identifier for the last event from the previous pagination request.
Number of events to retrieve. Defaults to 20.

response.body:
{
  "object": "fine_tuning.job",
  "data": [
    {
      "model": "<string>",
      "training_file": "<string>",
      "object": "fine_tuning.job",
      "created_at": "<integer>",
      "id": "<string>",
      "status": "succeeded",
      "fine_tuned_model": "<string>",
      "validation_file": "<string>",
      "result_files": [
        "<string>",
        "<string>"
      ],
      "finished_at": "<integer>",
      "organisation_id": "<string>",
      "trained_tokens": "<integer>",
      "hyperparameters": {
        "n_epochs": "<integer>",
        "batch_size": "<integer>",
        "learning_rate_multiplier": "<double>"
      },
      "suffix": "<string>"
    },
    {
      "model": "<string>",
      "training_file": "<string>",
      "object": "fine_tuning.job.event",
      "created_at": "<integer>",
      "id": "<string>",
      "status": "pending",
      "fine_tuned_model": "<string>",
      "validation_file": "<string>",
      "result_files": [
        "<string>",
        "<string>"
      ],
      "finished_at": "<integer>",
      "organisation_id": "<string>",
      "trained_tokens": "<integer>",
      "hyperparameters": {
        "n_epochs": "<integer>",
        "batch_size": "<integer>",
        "learning_rate_multiplier": "<double>"
      },
      "suffix": "<string>"
    }
  ],
  "has_more": "<boolean>"
}

response.name: An error occurred.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

query.description: Identifier for the last event from the previous pagination request.
Number of events to retrieve. Defaults to 20.

item.name:
Microsoft Azure Creates A Job That Fine Tunes A Specified Model From A Given Training File 
response Includes Details Of The Enqueued Job Including Job Status And Hyper Parameters 
the Name Of The Fine Tuned Model Is Added To The Response Once Complete

request.description: Needs a more full description created.

response.name: The fine tune has been successfully created.
